name: bolide-detector
description: Bolide/fireball detection and analysis — consumes JPL Fireball API (CNEOS) and NASA GLM Bolide Service data. Detects meteorite entries via geostationary lightning mapper sensors (GLM-16/17/18, EUMETSAT LI). Outputs $BOL FlatBuffer-aligned binary with location, energy, entry velocity, brightness classification, and ground track.
author: DigitalArsenal
